info.name: Grow Up More — Phase 9: Course Management
info.description: Phase 9 endpoints — Courses, Course Modules, Bundles (with translations) plus six junction tables (sub-categories, subjects, chapters, instructors, module-topics, bundle-courses). All bodies are application/json — phase 9 has no file uploads. Run requests in folder order; the create requests stash the newly-minted id into environment variables (courseId, courseModuleId, bundleId, courseSubCategoryId, courseSubjectId, courseChapterId, courseInstructorId, courseModuleTopicId, bundleCourseId).

request.description: Create a course. Saves id to {{courseId}}.

body.raw:
{
  "code": "COURSE-ML-101",
  "slug": "machine-learning-101",
  "difficultyLevel": "intermediate",
  "courseStatus": "draft",
  "durationHours": 40,
  "price": 4999,
  "originalPrice": 6999,
  "discountPercentage": 28,
  "currency": "INR",
  "isFree": false,
  "isFeatured": true,
  "hasCertificate": true,
  "maxStudents": 500,
  "isActive": true,
  "translation": {
    "languageId": 1,
    "title": "Machine Learning 101",
    "shortIntro": "Learn the fundamentals of machine learning.",
    "longIntro": "A comprehensive introduction to ML covering supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning.",
    "tagline": "From zero to model deployment.",
    "metaTitle": "Machine Learning 101 \u2014 Online Course",
    "metaKeywords": "machine learning, ml, ai, data science"
  }
}

request.description: Create a course. Saves id to {{courseId}}.

item.name: Course Sub-Categories
item.description: Junction binding a course to one or more sub-categories.

request.description: Create a course sub-category. Saves id to {{courseSubCategoryId}}.
Fetch one course sub-category by id.

item.name: Course Subjects

request.description: Create a course subject. Saves id to {{courseSubjectId}}.

item.name: Course Chapters
item.description: Junction binding a course-subject row to a phase-8 chapter.

request.description: Create a course chapter. Saves id to {{courseChapterId}}.

body.raw:
{
  "courseSubjectId": "{{courseSubjectId}}",
  "chapterId": 1,
  "displayOrder": 1,
  "isFreeTrial": true,
  "note": "Free trial chapter for prospective learners.",

}

item.name: Course Module Topics
item.description: Junction binding a module to a phase-8 topic.

body.raw:

}

request.description: Fetch one course module topic by id.

Create a bundle. Saves id to {{bundleId}}.
